zh.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn和Gruffudd ap Cadwgan至少有1個女兒。她去世於1403年之前在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn和Gruffudd ap Cadwgan至少有1个女儿。她去世于1403年之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn had at least 1 daughter with Gruffudd ap Cadwgan. She died before 1403, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn a eu au moins 1 fille avec Gruffudd ap Cadwgan. Elle est décédée avant 1403, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn hatte mit Gruffudd ap Cadwgan mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1403 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Gruffudd ap Cadwgan. Morì prima del 1403, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad verch LlewelynはGruffudd ap Cadwganとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1403年以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn(은)는 Gruffudd ap Cadwgan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn teve pelo menos 1 filha com Gruffudd ap Cadwgan. Ela faleceu antes 1403, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: У Angharad verch Llewelyn была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Gruffudd ap Cadwgan. Она умерла перед 1403 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Llewelyn tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Gruffudd ap Cadwgan. Murió antes de 1403, en Inglaterra.
